question: Berapa jumlah transaksi per hari dari kedua tabel digabung?
predicted_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN t1.type = 'transaction_enose' THEN 'transaction_enose' ELSE 'transaction_object_detection' END AS table_name, COUNT(*) AS total_transactions FROM (SELECT * FROM transaction_enose WHERE date_time >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-01-01') AND date_time < DATE_FORMAT(NOW() + INTERVAL 1 DAY, '%Y-01-01')) AS t1 UNION ALL SELECT CASE WHEN t1.type = 'transaction_enose' THEN 'transaction_enose' ELSE 'transaction_object_detection' END AS table_name, COUNT(*) AS total_transactions FROM (SELECT * FROM transaction_object_detection WHERE detection_time >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-01-01') AND detection_time < DATE_FORMAT(NOW() + INTERVAL 1 DAY, '%Y-01-01')) AS t2 GROUP BY table_name
